assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 5 of the plan explicitly shows: "git checkout TC-9005\ngit pull\ngit checkout -b TC-9205" and states: "The Target Branch is TC-9005 (not main). The task branch is named after the Jira issue ID TC-9205 (not TC-9005)."

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 10 shows the PR creation command: "gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title \"feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table\"" and explicitly notes: "PR base: --base TC-9005 (the Target Branch / parent feature branch, NOT main)"

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 5 shows "git checkout -b TC-9205" and explicitly states: "The task branch is named after the Jira issue ID TC-9205 (not TC-9005)." Step 10 also confirms: "Branch name: TC-9205 (the task issue ID)"

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 4 explicitly lists all three files for inspection: (1) "migration/src/lib.rs (file to modify) -- Use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview to understand the current structure", (2) "migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs (sibling migration, convention reference) -- Use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview then mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol with include_body=true", (3) "entity/src/advisory.rs (entity file, verification) -- Use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview to verify that the status column is no longer referenced"

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 10 shows the commit command: "git commit --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' -m \"feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table...\"" and explicitly notes: "Uses --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' for AI attribution"

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 10 shows the commit message: "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" which follows type(scope): description format. The footer contains "Implements TC-9205". The plan explicitly notes: "Conventional Commits format: feat(migration): <description>" and "Footer references the Jira issue ID: Implements TC-9205"

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: Step 1 includes a parsed table with "| **Target Branch** | **TC-9005** |" and a dedicated subsection "Target Branch extraction" stating: "The Target Branch section specifies TC-9005. This is a feature branch (not main), indicating a feature-branch workflow. The task branch will be created from this base, and the PR will target this branch."
